purpose: Independent stratified recall sample for open tenders ODC-01

window.notes: aligned to VPS complete open-proposals crawl

methodology.rule: Portal item verified via official PNCP API when possible; capture = presence in opportunity_intel active open snapshot
methodology.forbidden: Do not use COUNT(*) alone as recall
limitations: Sample size equals current open SC set (n=4); not a full 16-stratum independent portal walk
Missing required strata must fail closed for full recall claim

portal_items.orgao_nome: FUNDO MUNICIPAL DE SAUDE DE SANTA TEREZINHA DO PROGRESSO

portal_items.notes: Live open set from complete PNCP SC crawl; portal verification attempted via pncp-api
